title: Senior exodus: hidden costs of scale
meta_description: Cut senior engineer attrition 40% by fixing 4 hidden frictions — connection pools, retries, observability, and ownership tax. Concrete numbers and tooling from 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn out senior engineers without realizing it.

They don’t quit for money.

They quit because every fix feels like damage control and no credit lasts.
